title: Iron Biplane
description: A set of additional aircraft and engines for Immersive Aircraft with Blatium support in mind.
body:
[![Image](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=CurseForge&color=ECEBE6&labelColor=2F4858&style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iron-biplane)
[![Image](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Modrinth&color=ECEBE6&labelColor=2F4858&style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=green)](https://modrinth.com/mod/iron-biplane)


An addon for [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) which adds 5 aircraft and 5 engines (+2 if loaded [Blatium](https://modrinth.com/mod/blatium)).

**Unfortunately, the mod has one problem, it is not necessary to put anything in the weapon slots of the transport, this causes a critical error and loss of access to the world.**

Models and textures by Iron Biplane.
![copper biplane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tbim08wW/images/cc28b80a2d27788c4acb86cfd6955b844dd9ddda.png)
![iron biplane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tbim08wW/images/62dc74b9803e59c81fdf82c30804a2e98fdecb54.png)
![golden biplane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tbim08wW/images/ec5e42302e0efe40b5179ec247fcbc0e79a5a706.png)
![diamond biplane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tbim08wW/images/2712335cc9714da075f9736d3aa8268b450e74f5.png)
![netherite biplane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tbim08wW/images/cf6925ad474c2d42a5e4693727af86ef28df24c7.png)

https://blatfan.carrd.co/
